pi_items.source: Manual calculation of Bob Driller's organizational subtree (Bob + Charlie + Dave + Eve + Frank + Grace = 150000 + 100000 + 60000 + 60000 + 100000 + 65000)
Manual count of Bob Driller's subtree members (Bob Driller, Charlie Root, Dave Quick, Eve Fast, Frank Slow, Grace Hopper)
Task description lists 8 employees: Alice Sterling, Bob Driller, Hank Code, Charlie Root, Frank Slow, Dave Quick, Eve Fast, Grace Hopper
Single-root tree with 8 nodes has exactly 7 edges (one per employee except root Alice)
Task description specifies 'demodb' database; confirmed in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Task description specifies Staff class with properties Name (STRING), Role (STRING), Salary (INTEGER)
Task description specifies ReportsTo edge class with direction FROM subordinate TO manager
Task description lists Bob Driller (VP Sales, 150000)
Task description lists Hank Code (VP Tech, 160000)
Task description and export_result.sh script specify this path

privileged_info_summary: The hierarchy_salary_rollup task uses synthetic organizational data with 8 employees in a single-rooted tree structure within OrientDB's demodb database. Bob Driller's subtree contains 6 employees (including himself) with a total salary of 535,000. The organization has 7 edges (reporting relationships) connecting 8 staff members across roles from CEO (Alice Sterling at 200,000) through VP-level positions (Bob Driller at 150,000, Hank Code at 160,000) to manager and sales representative levels. The task requires calculating the cumulative salary rollup for Bob's entire organizational subtree and writing the result to /home/ga/salary_rollup.json.
